title: UPSRTC Bus Conductor Recruitment 2026 in Uttar Pradesh, India - Apply Now
excerpt: UPSRTC is hiring bus conductors in Kanpur, Fatehpur, and Unnao. Apply online from 06/07/2026 to 14/07/2026. No application fee is required.
value_prop: _Apply for the UPSRTC Bus Conductor Recruitment 2026 and get a chance to work with the Uttar Pradesh State Road Transport Corporation_

About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh State Road Transport Corporation (UPSRTC) is a public sector undertaking of the Government of Uttar Pradesh, responsible for providing bus services in the state.

The UPSRTC is headquartered in Lucknow and has a fleet of over 12,000 buses, operating on over 3,000 routes across the state.

About the Programme

The UPSRTC Bus Conductor Recruitment 2026 is an opportunity for individuals to work with the Uttar Pradesh State Road Transport Corporation (UPSRTC) as bus conductors.

The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for the post of bus conductor in the UPSRTC, and provide them with a chance to work in the public transport sector.
